_doc: Intake Autonomy v2 runner config (spec §3, plan B3.1b). liveVerify is CONSERVATIVE until B5.1 measures real Cloudflare deploy latency and flips calibrated:true. retries = TOTAL attempts including the first. schedule is metadata for humans + the runner contract; the authoritative trigger is the launchd plist StartCalendarInterval.

liveVerify._measured: B5.1 2026-07-10: push->live 55.5s / 30.3s / 60.4s (+ drill 50.4s); budget = ceil(p95x3) ~ 181s -> 13 attempts x 15s = 195s coverage
